email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Communication & Events bij Pulse Foundation. Uw focus op AI-gedreven communicatie sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en interesses.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, beheer ik content in WordPress en gebruik ik AI-tools zoals ChatGPT voor contentcreatie. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO toegepast om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik ben vertrouwd met sociale media (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook) en community management, en ik heb ervaring met Canva en videobewerking (CapCut).

Wat mij aanspreekt in Pulse Foundation is de kans om hands-on te leren van een AI-native Communications Lead en bij te dragen aan betekenisvolle projecten. Ik ben flexibel, proactief en werk graag in een snel veranderende omgeving.

Ik spreek Engels (vloeiend) en Nederlands (B1, in opleiding). Ik ben beschikbaar voor een stage van 6 maanden.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop u snel te spreken.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Communication & Events Internship at Pulse Foundation. Your focus on AI-driven communication aligns perfectly with my experience and interests.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, manage content in WordPress, and use AI tools like ChatGPT for content creation. On my own project mirook.com, I implemented structured data and GEO to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines. I am familiar with social media (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook) and community management, and I have experience with Canva and video editing (CapCut).

What attracts me to Pulse Foundation is the opportunity to learn hands-on from an AI-native Communications Lead and contribute to meaningful projects. I am flexible, proactive, and enjoy working in a fast-paced environment.

I speak English (fluent) and Dutch (B1, currently studying). I am available for a 6-month internship.

I attach my CV and cover letter. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste selectiecommissie,

Toen ik de vacature voor Communication & Events Intern bij Pulse Foundation las, voelde het alsof deze stage speciaal voor mij geschreven was. Uw nadruk op AI-gedreven communicatie en automatisering sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie om te groeien in een tech-savvy, purpose-driven omgeving.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik dagelijks bezig met digitale communicatie: ik beheer content in WordPress, optimaliseer websites voor zoekmachines (SEO/GEO) en gebruik AI-tools zoals ChatGPT voor het opstellen van teksten en contentonderzoek. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema) en GEO toegepast om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd hoe AI workflows kan versnellen en verbeteren.

U vraagt om ervaring met sociale media en community management. Ik beheer de sociale mediakanalen van mirook.com (Instagram, Facebook) en heb gewerkt aan contentkalenders en engagement. Ook heb ik ervaring met Canva voor visuele content en CapCut voor videobewerking. Ik ben leergierig en wil graag mijn vaardigheden in Mailchimp en WordPress verder ontwikkelen.

Wat mij bijzonder aanspreekt in Pulse Foundation is de kans om te leren van een AI-native Communications Lead en bij te dragen aan automatiseringen met tools zoals Zapier en Make. Ik ben een teamspeler met initiatief, werk gestructureerd en pas me snel aan. Ik spreek Engels (vloeiend) en Nederlands (B1, in opleiding).

Ik ben beschikbaar voor een stage van 6 maanden en kijk ernaar uit om mijn AI-ervaring en creativiteit in te zetten voor uw missie. Ik hoop u snel te ontmoeten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok

--- English version ---

Dear selection committee,

When I read the vacancy for Communication & Events Intern at Pulse Foundation, it felt like this internship was written for me. Your emphasis on AI-driven communication and automation aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition to grow in a tech-savvy, purpose-driven environment.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I work daily with digital communication: I manage content in WordPress, optimize websites for search engines (SEO/GEO), and use AI tools like ChatGPT for drafting texts and content research. On my own project mirook.com, I implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and GEO to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines. This experience has taught me how AI can accelerate and improve workflows.

You ask for experience with social media and community management. I manage the social media channels of mirook.com (Instagram, Facebook) and have worked on content calendars and engagement. I also have experience with Canva for visual content and CapCut for video editing. I am eager to further develop my skills in Mailchimp and WordPress.

What particularly appeals to me at Pulse Foundation is the opportunity to learn from an AI-native Communications Lead and contribute to automations with tools like Zapier and Make. I am a team player with initiative, work in a structured way, and adapt quickly. I speak English (fluent) and Dutch (B1, currently studying).

I am available for a 6-month internship and look forward to applying my AI experience and creativity to your mission. I hope to meet you soon.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on digital communication: content management in WordPress, social media (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook), and community management
- Daily use of AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) for content drafting, research, and automation
- Experience with Canva, video editing (CapCut), and structured data (JSON-LD) for AI search visibility
- Proactive, flexible team player with strong initiative and a creative mindset
- Trilingual: English (fluent), Dutch (B1, studying), Turkish (native)
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in digital communication, content management, and AI-driven workflows. At Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build/maintain WordPress sites. On my own project (mirook.com), I applied structured data and GEO to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines. Comfortable with social media coordination, community management, and performance reporting. Quick to learn new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Digital Communication & Content: social media content & integration, community management, SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- AI & Automation: daily use of ChatGPT, Claude, Canva AI for content drafting, captioning, and research; familiarity with AI agents and automation concepts
- Social Media: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook – content publishing, engagement, community management
- Video & Visual: Canva, CapCut, basic video editing
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Web & CMS: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design
- Analytics & Reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
